title: Proactive Preparation and Hardening Against Destructive Attacks: 2026 Edition

scripts.content:
#!/bin/bash
# CDB APEX v37.0 — Block threat IPs for: Proactive Preparation and Hardening Against Destructive Atta
iptables -A INPUT -s 1.3.6.1 -j DROP
iptables -A INPUT -s 2.5.29.37 -j DROP
iptables -A INPUT -s 5.2.3.4 -j DROP
iptables -A INPUT -s 5.5.7.3 -j DROP
iptables -A OUTPUT -d 1.3.6.1 -j DROP
iptables -A OUTPUT -d 2.5.29.37 -j DROP
iptables -A OUTPUT -d 5.2.3.4 -j DROP
iptables -A OUTPUT -d 5.5.7.3 -j DROP
echo 'Firewall rules applied'

| CDB APEX v37.0 Threat Hunt Query
index=* ((dest_ip IN ("1.3.6.1","2.5.29.37","5.2.3.4","5.5.7.3")) OR (query IN ("details.aspx","gpo-listing-all.csv","hostd.log","pfirewall.log","shell.log","snapshot.removeall","vim.event","vpxa.log","vpxd.log","vshphere.local"))) | stats count by src_ip, dest_ip, action | sort -count

#!/bin/bash
# CDB APEX v37.0 — Emergency Hardening Script
# Threat: Proactive Preparation and Hardening Against Destructive Atta
# Generated: 2026-03-16T03:45:47.504947+00:00

echo "[*] Updating system packages..."
apt-get update && apt-get upgrade -y 2>/dev/null || yum update -y 2>/dev/null

echo "[*] Enabling firewall..."
ufw enable 2>/dev/null || firewall-cmd --set-default-zone=drop 2>/dev/null

echo "[*] Disabling unnecessary services..."
systemctl disable --now telnet.socket 2>/dev/null
systemctl disable --now rsh.socket 2>/dev/null

echo "[*] Setting secure SSH configuration..."
sed -i 's/#PermitRootLogin yes/PermitRootLogin no/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config
sed -i 's/#PasswordAuthentication yes/PasswordAuthentication no/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config
systemctl restart sshd

echo "[+] Hardening complete for threat: thr-a29298625b89"
